name: IllumiNeuro Protocol
subtitle: Four-Peptide Cognitive Enhancement Blend
overview: IllumiNeuro is a cognitive enhancement peptide blend combining four nootropic peptides: PE-22-28 (neuritogenic), Pinealon (pineal bioregulator), NA-Semax Amidate (neuroprotective/cognitive), and NA-Selank Amidate (anxiolytic/cognitive). The standard formulation contains 48mg total (PE-22-28 10mg + Pinealon 10mg + NA-Semax 20mg + NA-Selank 8mg). This blend targets multiple neurological pathways for comprehensive cognitive support, though no clinical studies exist on this specific four-peptide combination.
mechanism: Each peptide contributes distinct neurological mechanisms: PE-22-28 promotes neurite outgrowth and neural connectivity through sphingosine-1-phosphate receptor modulation; Pinealon is a bioregulator that supports pineal gland function and circadian regulation; NA-Semax Amidate provides BDNF upregulation and neuroprotection; NA-Selank Amidate offers anxiolytic effects through GABA modulation and immune-neuroendocrine regulation. Together, they theoretically address cognitive enhancement, neuroprotection, mood support, and neural regeneration.

items.name: Memory & Learning
items.description: Combined BDNF support and neuritogenic effects may enhance memory formation and learning.

items.name: Focus & Concentration
items.description: NA-Semax component supports sustained attention and mental clarity.

items.name: Neuroprotection
items.description: Multiple pathways protecting neural tissue from oxidative stress and damage.

items.name: Anxiety Reduction
items.description: NA-Selank provides anxiolytic effects through GABA modulation.

items.name: Stress Adaptation
items.description: Immune-neuroendocrine support helps with stress resilience.

items.name: Mood Support
items.description: Combined effects on neurotransmitter systems may improve overall mood.

items.name: Neurite Outgrowth
items.description: PE-22-28 promotes neural connectivity and neurite extension.

items.name: Circadian Regulation
items.description: Pinealon supports healthy sleep-wake cycles and pineal function.

deliveryMethods.overview: Subcutaneous injection is the standard delivery method. Some users also administer intranasally for more direct CNS effects. Amidate forms (NA-Semax and NA-Selank) have enhanced stability and duration.

steps: Clean vial top with alcohol pad

deliveryMethods.overview: Intranasal delivery provides more direct access to the CNS. The component peptides (especially Semax and Selank) have established intranasal protocols.

interactions.notes: Already contains NA-Semax - do not add more to avoid overdosing.
Already contains NA-Selank - do not add more.
Both highly neuroactive; use caution combining multiple cognitive enhancers.
Different targets; BPC-157 may complement with healing/gut-brain effects.
The blend has stimulatory cognitive effects; monitor if combining with other stimulants.

timeline.effects: NA-Semax/Selank effects may be noticeable quickly (focus, anxiety reduction)
Cognitive enhancement and mood effects develop
Full protocol benefits; assess and cycle off

contraindications: No clinical trials on four-peptide combination
Bipolar disorder or psychosis (caution with cognitive enhancers)

good: Third-party testing confirming all four components
Certificate of Analysis with ratios verified
warning: Research-only status - not approved for human use
Complex four-peptide formulation may have batch variability

references.title: PE-22-28 Neuritogenic Effects
references.keyFindings: PE-22-28 promotes neurite outgrowth through S1P receptor modulation.

references.title: NA-Semax Amidate Cognitive Enhancement
references.keyFindings: Enhanced stability amidate form of Semax with BDNF upregulation and neuroprotective effects.

references.title: NA-Selank Amidate Anxiolytic Properties
references.keyFindings: Selank demonstrates anxiolytic effects through GABA modulation and immune-neuroendocrine regulation.

references.title: Pinealon Bioregulator
references.keyFindings: Pinealon (EDR tripeptide) supports pineal gland function and circadian regulation.

quickStats.frequency: Once daily, preferably in the morning for cognitive benefits
quickStats.storage: Lyophilized: Room temperature. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks
